rubygem-simpleidn.diff

Added dns/rubygem-simpleidn [1].

"SimpleIDN allows easy conversion from punycode ACE (IDNA) strings to unicode UTF-8 strings and visa versa."

[1] https://github.com/mmriis/simpleidn
